sections.paragraph:
- Original: μηδείςμηδεμίαμηδέν

- Transliteration: medeis

- Phonetic: may-dice'

- Definition:

1. nobody, no one, nothing

- Origin: from G3361 and G1520

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: the masculine feminine irregular (second form) and neuter (third form) from G3361 and G1520; not even one (man woman thing): - any (man thing) no (man) none not (at all any man a whit) nothing + without delay.
